description: NEXUS-14 Sprint 5 curated topic registry. Selection is LEXICOGRAPHIC: monetization_score (desc) > traffic_score (desc) > variety (least-used category, then id). status: candidate = selectable | in_progress = picked by a run, not yet confirmed live | published = live on WordPress. in_progress and published are both excluded from re-selection (never repeat a topic).
scoring_rule: monetization > traffic > variety (no compensation: monetization always dominates)
